title: 'Abd al-Malik' s Desire to Remove His Brother from the Succession
description: 'Abd al-Malik' s Desire to Remove His Brother from the Succession. Recorded under the year 85 AH (704–705 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 23.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 23
